tipRules.tip: Frazee (Midwest finesse): Rig the 3-inch Ika on a 1/32-oz mushroom head jig three ways — as a solid-body tube (tentacles as tail), reversed (tentacles at collar), or wacky style
Frazee (Midwest finesse): Retrieve the 3-inch Ika with all six standard Midwest finesse retrieves or a jig-and-bobber presentation

knowledge.insight: The 3-inch Ika has a 1.5-inch torso shaped like a Senko with six tentacles radiating from one end; salt-impregnated; available in 14 colors
